case_title: ORESTES CROSS, ESQ. VS. INFINITY FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS, INC. ET AL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CROSS, ESQ., ORESTES AS TO DEFENDANT INFINITY FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS, INC. ET AL DBA TROPICAL SUN REALTY HAUPT, IV, MR. FRED J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2008 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MR. FRED J. HAUPT, IV BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-31-2008 AT 1:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSS, ESQ., ORESTES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INFINITY FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS, INC. ET AL DBA TROPICAL SUN REALTY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $216.00 INTEREST, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,833.50, DEFENDANT FRED J. HAUPT IV DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. (506).
